markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Onboard Sulaman to Looker dashboard processes and discuss potential automation improvements](https://fathom.video/share/sKzRzq2R6WJgvxk9PCFZwhzFLsy_y2xL?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Vivek guided Sulaman through Looker dashboard setup, focusing on data sources, custom fields, and filters](https://fathom.video/share/sKzRzq2R6WJgvxk9PCFZwhzFLsy_y2xL?tab=summary&timestamp=386.0)
  - [Current process requires manual weekly updates of published URLs, which Managing Editors are reluctant to do](https://fathom.video/share/sKzRzq2R6WJgvxk9PCFZwhzFLsy_y2xL?tab=summary&timestamp=532.0)
  - [Sulaman identified opportunities for automation, particularly in URL list updates and data source switching](https://fathom.video/share/sKzRzq2R6WJgvxk9PCFZwhzFLsy_y2xL?tab=summary&timestamp=571.0)
  - [Additional dashboard requirements from Andy were discussed, most of which are achievable within current setup](https://fathom.video/share/sKzRzq2R6WJgvxk9PCFZwhzFLsy_y2xL?tab=summary&timestamp=304.0)

## Topics

### Looker Dashboard Setup Process

  - [Change data sources from existing client (e.g. DataGrid) to new client (e.g. Flossom)](https://fathom.video/share/sKzRzq2R6WJgvxk9PCFZwhzFLsy_y2xL?tab=summary&timestamp=1074.0)
  - [Create custom fields for URL cohorts in both Google Search Console (GSC) and Google Analytics 4 (GA4)](https://fathom.video/share/sKzRzq2R6WJgvxk9PCFZwhzFLsy_y2xL?tab=summary&timestamp=1233.0)
  - [Update filters, especially for non-branded queries](https://fathom.video/share/sKzRzq2R6WJgvxk9PCFZwhzFLsy_y2xL?tab=summary&timestamp=1426.0)
  - [Ensure cross-filtering is enabled for interlinked chart updates](https://fathom.video/share/sKzRzq2R6WJgvxk9PCFZwhzFLsy_y2xL?tab=summary&timestamp=3001.0)
  - [Handle blended data sources carefully, particularly for keyword ranking charts](https://fathom.video/share/sKzRzq2R6WJgvxk9PCFZwhzFLsy_y2xL?tab=summary&timestamp=408.0)

### Current Manual Processes

  - [Weekly updates of newly published URLs required](https://fathom.video/share/sKzRzq2R6WJgvxk9PCFZwhzFLsy_y2xL?tab=summary&timestamp=21.0)
  - [Process involves copying URLs and categories from Airtable to Google Sheets](https://fathom.video/share/sKzRzq2R6WJgvxk9PCFZwhzFLsy_y2xL?tab=summary&timestamp=85.0)
  - [Using Claude AI to format data into case statements for custom fields](https://fathom.video/share/sKzRzq2R6WJgvxk9PCFZwhzFLsy_y2xL?tab=summary&timestamp=380.0)
  - [Updating custom fields in Looker with new URL data](https://fathom.video/share/sKzRzq2R6WJgvxk9PCFZwhzFLsy_y2xL?tab=summary&timestamp=129.0)

### Automation Opportunities

  - [Explore connecting Airtable directly to Looker or using Google Apps Script as intermediary](https://fathom.video/share/sKzRzq2R6WJgvxk9PCFZwhzFLsy_y2xL?tab=summary&timestamp=571.0)
  - [Investigate bulk data source switching capabilities in Looker](https://fathom.video/share/sKzRzq2R6WJgvxk9PCFZwhzFLsy_y2xL?tab=summary&timestamp=1216.0)
  - [Consider automating the generation of branded keyword lists for filters](https://fathom.video/share/sKzRzq2R6WJgvxk9PCFZwhzFLsy_y2xL?tab=summary&timestamp=1459.0)

### Additional Dashboard Requirements

  - [Most requirements from Andy's ticket are achievable within current setup](https://fathom.video/share/sKzRzq2R6WJgvxk9PCFZwhzFLsy_y2xL?tab=summary&timestamp=304.0)
  - [GSC errors not available via API, may require manual screenshots](https://fathom.video/share/sKzRzq2R6WJgvxk9PCFZwhzFLsy_y2xL?tab=summary&timestamp=346.0)
  - [Content calendar integration possible through Airtable to Google Sheets export](https://fathom.video/share/sKzRzq2R6WJgvxk9PCFZwhzFLsy_y2xL?tab=summary&timestamp=304.0)

### Hierarchy and Roles

  - [Content Managers (CMs) -\> Managing Editors (MEs) -\> Directors -\> Leadership Committee](https://fathom.video/share/sKzRzq2R6WJgvxk9PCFZwhzFLsy_y2xL?tab=summary&timestamp=1034.0)
  - [MEs are responsible for presenting reports to clients and updating Looker dashboards](https://fathom.video/share/sKzRzq2R6WJgvxk9PCFZwhzFLsy_y2xL?tab=summary&timestamp=1058.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Sulaman to request Airtable access for all client accounts](https://fathom.video/share/sKzRzq2R6WJgvxk9PCFZwhzFLsy_y2xL?tab=summary&timestamp=1888.0)
  - [Investigate automation possibilities for URL list updates and data source switching](https://fathom.video/share/sKzRzq2R6WJgvxk9PCFZwhzFLsy_y2xL?tab=summary&timestamp=1527.0)
  - [Update Looker dashboards for assigned clients (e.g. Flossom)](https://fathom.video/share/sKzRzq2R6WJgvxk9PCFZwhzFLsy_y2xL?tab=summary&timestamp=1074.0)
  - [Communicate with MEs about continuing manual updates if automation isn't ready](https://fathom.video/share/sKzRzq2R6WJgvxk9PCFZwhzFLsy_y2xL?tab=summary&timestamp=1542.0)
  - [Follow up with Vivek on Engine ANA3 ticket regarding event tracking in Google Tag Manager](https://fathom.video/share/sKzRzq2R6WJgvxk9PCFZwhzFLsy_y2xL?tab=summary&timestamp=1456.0)
